name: QC Copper and Gold Inc.
description: QC Copper and Gold Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of copper and gold projects. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, the company is primarily engaged in advancing its flagship Opemiska Copper-Gold Project located in the Chibougamau mining camp of Quebec. Formerly known as PowerOre Inc., the company rebranded in 2020 to better reflect its strategic focus on high-potential copper and gold assets. QC Copper and Gold Inc. is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange, aiming to deliver value through systematic exploration and resource expansion in established mining jurisdictions.
